text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All things big and small can be divided into yin
and yang. For example, yin is water, moon, and
earth. Yang is fire, sun, and sky... You get the
idea!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
They might seem like polar opposites, but there's
one thing you can't forget—only when the two
mix can balance be achieved.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That also goes for how we think. Too much yang
and you'll become short-sighted. Too much yin,
and you'll become overly anxious.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
In other words: in all things, moderation. A
balanced approach is best!
